Best Crypto to Invest In: $2.4M Hack Hits Cardano as Pepeto Crosses $10.3M With Live Tools
results.description: SecondFi, the Cardano wallet formerly known as Yoroi, lost $2.4 million on June 23 after attackers exploited its wallet generation code. The breach hit 178 wallets and may reach $20 million according to SlowMist, and ADA fell to its lowest
